Identity.History: The communal and safe space in any Māori iwi, the marae serves many; it is a place for religious rituals and social ceremonies and was the stage for pōwhiri and karanga

Trainer.Entities: units/{civ}/infantry_spearman_b units/{civ}/infantry_javelineer_b units/{civ}/cavalry_javelineer_b units/{civ}/infantry_melee_toa_b units/{civ}/infantry_melee_taitamariki_b units/{civ}/infantry_ranged_wahine_toa_b units/{civ}/infantry_ranged_toa_parau_b units/{civ}/infantry_melee_parekura_b
